clients.title: Clients

form.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
form.name: Name
form.territory_hint: Cities taken from existing clients. Updates when you add a client in a new city.
form.city_depot_hint: Operational route this city belongs to

clients.deactivate_confirm: Deactivate {{name}}? They will move to Inactive status and no longer appear as active in lists and operations.
clients.reactivate_confirm: Reactivate {{name}}? They will return to Active status.
clients.remove_confirm: Delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone from the app. Only allowed if they hold no cylinders or accessories.

detail.title: Cylinder {{serial}}
detail.empty: No movements yet — cylinder is new

form.edit_hint: You can correct gas, capacity, and home depot. Ledger movements are managed under Movements.
form.edit_locked_at_client: Cylinder data cannot be edited while it is held by a client. Record a return first.
form.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
form.capacity_hint: m³ for compressed gas, kg for liquefied / weight-sold
form.territory_hint: Home depot for the cylinder. Cities are used in the location filter or when creating a locality.
form.mark_full_hint: Record a plant fill: empty stock → full stock.
form.mark_empty_hint: Record emptying: full stock → empty stock.
form.locality_territory_hint: Optional: operating territory this city belongs to

workshop.title: Workshop
workshop.hint: Fill/empty and correct master data while the cylinder is in plant.
workshop.edit_locked_at_client: Gas and capacity cannot be changed while the cylinder is with a client.
workshop.fill_hint: Cylinder is empty in stock — mark it full after filling.
workshop.empty_hint: Cylinder is full in stock — mark it empty if needed.
workshop.condition_unavailable: Fill/empty is only available when the cylinder is in plant stock.
workshop.fill_unavailable: No fill/empty action available for this state.

inline.capacity_invalid: Enter a capacity greater than zero

form.title: New battery
form.members_hint: Pick cylinders (chips). You can also paste comma-separated IDs. At least 2 (BR-13).

form.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
form.hint_rental: Rental: only our or supplier cylinders available in plant stock (not ones already with another client).
form.hint_refill: Refill (customer-owned): the client is the cylinder owner — no separate picker.
form.cylinder_hint_rental: Rentable only: in-stock empty/full, not held by a client.
form.owner_client_placeholder: Pick a cylinder to see the owner

return.title: Record return
return.invalid_preview: Return date must be on or after delivery

swap.title: Record swap
swap.summary: Return {{serial}} from {{holder}} and deliver another cylinder instead
swap.hint: The current cylinder returns to empty stock and the replacement is delivered to the same client.
swap.list_hint: Swap: use the Swap button above, or on the right of an Open movement. Rentals also offer Return; customer-owned (refill) cylinders only allow Swap.
swap.pick_hint: Open movements only. Search by serial or client.
swap.replacement_hint: Search stock by serial (or customer-owned for a refill).

notes.healed_stale_open: Auto-closed due to a later delivery
notes.healed_truncate_span: Loan end adjusted for a later delivery

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.duplicate_cuit: A client with this CUIT already exists
errors.version_conflict: This record was modified by someone else. Reload and try again.
errors.duplicate_serial: That serial already exists for this owner
errors.duplicate_location: A location with that name already exists
errors.cylinder_held_by_client: Cylinder data cannot be edited while held by a client
errors.cylinder_terminal: Cylinder is in a terminal state
errors.kind_basis_mismatch: Refill applies only to customer-owned cylinders; rental to ours/supplier
errors.returned_cylinder_busy: Returned cylinder already has an open movement
errors.already_terminal: Cylinder is already in a terminal state
errors.member_already_packed: Cylinder is already in an active battery
errors.replacement_not_available: Replacement cylinder is not available in stock
errors.stage_out_of_order: Loan stage cannot advance in that order
errors.rate_overlap: An overlapping rate already exists for that client/gas
errors.period_locked: Period already has approved or exported invoices
errors.not_approved: Billing run must be approved before export
errors.duplicate_username: A user with this username already exists
errors.has_open_movements: This client still holds cylinders. Return or close those movements before deleting.
errors.has_open_accessories: This client still holds accessories on loan. Recover them before deleting.

status.overdue_hint: Received from supplier on {{received}}. Still open for {{days}} days; configured limit is {{threshold}} days.

threshold.title: Days until overdue
threshold.help: An open supplier loan is overdue after this many days from receipt from the supplier.

transfers.title: Stock transfers
transfers.subtitle: Moves between nodes, loans to clients, or trips to refill. The pill shows where the cylinder is.

form.title: New transfer
form.party_hint: Search by name: nodes, hub, suppliers, or clients
form.entry_date_hint: Optional: when it came back. Leave empty if still out.

reconciliation.title: Inventory reconciliation
reconciliation.subtitle: Two different tools: see which cylinders are out with clients, and separately audit plant stock against the system.

pills.outstanding: Outstanding → delivered tubes with no return
pills.count: Physical count → audit plant stock (not the client list)

outstanding.help: Automatic list of cylinders with an open movement — still held by the client. Use it to chase returns and see rental days. This is not a plant stock count.

count.help: Not the same as Outstanding. Enter serials you counted at the plant; the system compares them to its records. If a tube is here but the system shows it at a client/supplier, it flags that (and shows who holds it).
count.serials_hint: One per line or comma-separated. By default only these serials are classified (matched / elsewhere / unknown).
count.full_plant: Full plant count (report unscanned in-stock cylinders as possible loss)
count.full_plant_warning: Every in-stock cylinder not in the list will appear as absent / loss. Use only when you counted the entire plant inventory.
count.read_only: Cylinder write permission is required to run a count

alerts.title: Operational alerts
alerts.subtitle: Follow-up list: long rentals and pending refills — call the client, note the response, and keep stock traceability.

filters.kind_hint_rental: Our or supplier cylinders held too long — reclaim or confirm continued rental.
filters.kind_hint_refill: Customer-owned cylinders with no recent movement — ask if they need a refill.

contact.title: Log client contact
contact.note_placeholder: e.g. Spoke with María — needs refill next week / keeping rental / no answer
contact.note_help: Records whether the client was contacted and what they said.

form.title: New rate
form.capacity_hint: Leave as Any size to apply to all capacities
form.effective_from_hint: To bill long-open rentals, use a date on or before the period start (not only today).
form.precedence_hint: Most specific wins: client+gas+size → client+gas → client → gas → size → global (BR-19).

backfill.title: Apply rates to open rentals
backfill.body_all: Fills client daily defaults when missing (and adds onto existing ones when a general rate applies), then regenerates a history billing draft so all open rentals are recalculated at current rates. Prior drafts in the same scope are replaced.
backfill.body_rate: With this rate: if it is general (any gas/size), fills or adds the client daily default; then regenerates the history billing draft (scoped to the rate’s client, or all clients if global). Prior drafts in the same scope are replaced.
backfill.done: Backfill done: {{filled}} defaults set · {{increased}} defaults increased · {{invoices}} invoices · {{lines}} lines · skipped {{skipped}} · total {{total}} ARS

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Draft → approve → export. From/To apply only to Generate draft. History ignores those filters and bills each open rental from its delivery date through today, at the effective rate.
billing.period_hint: These dates apply only to Generate draft.
billing.history_hint: Ignores From/To. Uses each open loan’s delivery date → today.
billing.empty: No draft for this period yet
billing.run_summary: Draft #{{id}} ({{status}}): {{invoices}} invoices · {{lines}} cylinders · {{days}} cylinder-days · total {{total}} ARS · period {{from}} → {{to}}
billing.run_summary_history: History #{{id}} ({{status}}): {{invoices}} invoices · {{lines}} cylinders · {{days}} cylinder-days · total {{total}} ARS · from oldest delivery {{from}} → {{to}} (date filter not used)
billing.days_hint: Cylinder-days = sum of each cylinder’s days in the period (e.g. 22 cylinders × 30 d = 660), not calendar days in the month.
billing.skipped_no_rate: {{count}} rentals were skipped — no matching rate (and no client daily default). Configure rates, then regenerate the draft.

ledger.subtitle: Cylinders on hand, delivery/return history and rentals — independent of the invoice.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Where cylinders are, how long they've been out, and each client's activity.
reports.hint_client_ledger: Click a client name to open their ledger: rentals, refills, and history.

settings.title: Configuration
settings.subtitle: Appearance and operational settings
settings.operational_subtitle: Timezone, language, and system thresholds used by alerts, loans, and billing
settings.business_timezone_help: Defines the civil day for aging, accruals, and reports
settings.rental_min_days_help: Minimum billable days per rental. 0 = exact calendar days
settings.supplier_loan_overdue_days_help: Open supplier loan loops older than this are marked overdue
settings.long_outstanding_days_help: OPEN movements older than this raise a long-outstanding alert. Save, then use Refresh alerts to apply the new threshold.

themes.title: Appearance
themes.subtitle: Choose a light or dark theme. The toolbar button switches between your last light and dark picks.
themes.weld_light_hint: Brand green on warm neutral surfaces
themes.slate_light_hint: Cool gray surfaces with a dark app bar
themes.mist_light_hint: Soft blue-gray with deep green accents
themes.charcoal_dark_hint: Muted charcoal with readable body text

users.title: Users & permissions
users.subtitle: Create users, assign roles and territories, or remove accounts
users.remove_confirm: Remove {{username}}? They will no longer be able to sign in.

form.password_optional_help: Leave blank to keep the current password
form.territories_hint: Empty = all territories. Or pick one or more, “Select all”, or “Add territory…”

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Immutable trail of who changed what and when
audit.empty: No audit entries for these filters

migration_data.title: Import / export data
migration_data.subtitle: Migrate legacy Excel workbooks into Weld, export live data for double-checking, and keep restore points with sync / rollback.
migration_data.import_help: Upload each workbook into its own slot. Do not mix files: Junín, Chacabuco, and Propios are distinct migrator inputs.
migration_data.xls_only: Only legacy .xls (Excel 97–2003 / BIFF) files are accepted. Modern .xlsx files are not valid for this migration.
migration_data.version_label_help: Used when creating the pre-Sync snapshot so you can recognize this run later.
migration_data.sync_confirm_body: A database snapshot is taken first, then the three workbooks are loaded. The migration exception queue is regenerated. Prefer running a simulation first.
migration_data.export_help: After Sync, download these live-system Excel files to compare against the original workbooks (double-check).
migration_data.export_all_help: Clients + cylinders + movements + exceptions in one ZIP.
migration_data.export_cylinders_help: Fleet with serial, gas, capacity, and state.
migration_data.export_exceptions_help: Rows the migrator could not import cleanly.
migration_data.versions_help: Each Sync keeps a pre-run snapshot. Mark working versions as good and use Rollback if a run goes wrong.
migration_data.no_snapshots: No snapshots yet. They appear after Sync.
migration_data.rollback_confirm_body: This replaces the current database state with the chosen snapshot. Changes after that snapshot are lost.
migration_data.purge_warning: This permanently deletes business data. It cannot be undone unless you already have a snapshot.
migration_data.purge_keeps: Kept: users, roles, permissions, sessions, system settings, gas catalog (types + aliases), territories and localities.
migration_data.purge_deletes: Deleted: clients, cylinders, batteries, movements, loans, transfers, accessories, rates, billing, alerts, migration exceptions, audit log, and business parties (SELF and user-linked parties are kept).
migration_data.purge_confirm_body: You will delete clients, cylinders, movements and the rest of operations. Users and system settings are NOT touched. Use this only before re-importing clean Excel workbooks.
